REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-08-2019 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL BY PAUL MARTIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, AND DEFENDANT ERIC DECASTRO, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT DENIED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. CASE DID NOT SETTLE IN THE HALLWAY. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-06-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
